behavior_summary: U8P_KEGNS::look is a U8P_KEGNS::look/examine handler for a keg object. When the player examines the object the script displays a single short bark 'keg' and then suspends/ends the U8P_KEGNS::look process.
There are no conditionals, menus, flag reads/writes, or parameter-driven branches; the behavior is fixed and minimal.
The handler may also be invoked by engine fast-area entry semantics in some contexts (inferred), but the canonical entry form is the 'U8P_KEGNS::look' process type.
notable_control_flow: U8P_KEGNS::look: emit Bark('keg') -> call suspend() to end or pause the process.
open_questions: Is this handler reachable via both the explicit player 'U8P_KEGNS::look' action and a fast-area enter trigger, or only by the player examine action? (inferred from process type; confidence: low)
Is the bark text 'keg' a localization key or the final displayed string? (inferred; confidence: low)

main_function.name: U8P_KEGNS::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the object's short in-world description when examined: show a single bark text 'keg' and then suspend the process.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine's U8P_KEGNS::look/examine action for this item (process type 0x0208).
May also be invoked by entering the object's fast-area trigger region in some engine contexts (inferred).

function_map.name: U8P_KEGNS::look
function_map.role: U8P_KEGNS::look/examine handler that emits a short bark and suspends

external_calls.purpose: Display a short player-facing text/bark ('keg') when the object is examined.
Suspend or terminate the U8P_KEGNS::look process after emitting the bark; ends the handler's execution.
